title: summer
description: Analog weighted summer / difference amplifier. Modelled as a simulator-agnostic IDEAL behavioural block (out = gainA·V(inA) + gainB·V(inB)) — a control-computing primitive rather than a parametric part catalog. With gainB negative it is a difference (e.g. a control error). The presence of the 'summer' field at the top level discriminates the family. Pins: inA, inB, out.

gainB.description: Weight on input B (negative -> a difference).
